description: Operational overview for ibc-prometheus-exporter: REST health, packet backlog, client trust freshness, channel state, and exporter errors.

panels.description: Average health of configured REST endpoints selected by chain.
panels.title: REST Availability

panels.description: Number of selected chains currently represented by REST health metrics.
panels.title: Chains Reporting

panels.description: Total selected SendPacket backlog across chains and channels.

targets.expr: sum(ibc_send_packet_backlog_size{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"}) or vector(0)

panels.title: Send Backlog

panels.description: Age of the oldest selected pending SendPacket.

targets.expr: max((time() - ibc_send_packet_backlog_oldest_timestamp_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"}) and ibc_send_packet_backlog_oldest_timestamp_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"} > 0) or vector(0)

panels.title: Oldest Send Age

panels.description: Age of the oldest selected acknowledgement backlog item.

targets.expr: max((time() - ibc_ack_packet_backlog_oldest_timestamp_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"}) and ibc_ack_packet_backlog_oldest_timestamp_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"} > 0) or vector(0)

panels.title: Oldest Ack Age

panels.description: Exporter errors over the selected dashboard time range.
panels.title: Errors In Range

panels.description: Seconds since each chain last completed a successful backlog update.
panels.title: Backlog Update Freshness

targets.expr: sum by (chain_id) (ibc_send_packet_backlog_size{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"})

panels.description: Oldest pending SendPacket age across the selected filters.

targets.expr: max((time() - ibc_send_packet_backlog_oldest_timestamp_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"}) and ibc_send_packet_backlog_oldest_timestamp_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"} > 0) or vector(0)

panels.title: Oldest SendPacket Age

panels.description: Largest send backlogs by channel path.
panels.title: Top Send Backlogs

targets.expr: topk(50, (time() - ibc_send_packet_backlog_oldest_timestamp_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"}) and ibc_send_packet_backlog_oldest_timestamp_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"} > 0)

panels.description: Oldest pending SendPacket sequence by channel path.
panels.title: Oldest Send Sequence

panels.description: Total acknowledgement backlog grouped by chain. Falls back to an active-channel count when ack backlog size is not exported.

targets.expr: sum by (chain_id) ((ibc_ack_packet_backlog_size{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"} or on (chain_id, connection_id, port_id, channel_id, counterparty_chain_id, counterparty_port_id, counterparty_channel_id) (ibc_ack_packet_backlog_oldest_sequence{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"} > bool 0)))

panels.title: Ack Backlog By Chain

panels.description: Oldest pending AcknowledgementPacket age across the selected filters.

targets.expr: max((time() - ibc_ack_packet_backlog_oldest_timestamp_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"}) and ibc_ack_packet_backlog_oldest_timestamp_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"} > 0) or vector(0)

panels.title: Oldest AckPacket Age

panels.description: Largest acknowledgement backlogs by channel path.

targets.expr: topk(6, (ibc_ack_packet_backlog_size{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"} or on (chain_id, connection_id, port_id, channel_id, counterparty_chain_id, counterparty_port_id, counterparty_channel_id) (ibc_ack_packet_backlog_oldest_sequence{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"} > bool 0)))

panels.title: Top Ack Backlogs

panels.description: Per-channel age of the oldest pending acknowledgement.

targets.expr: topk(50, (time() - ibc_ack_packet_backlog_oldest_timestamp_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"}) and ibc_ack_packet_backlog_oldest_timestamp_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"} > 0)

panels.title: Oldest Ack Age Inventory

panels.description: Oldest pending AcknowledgementPacket sequence by channel path.
panels.title: Oldest Ack Sequence

panels.description: Per-channel acknowledgement backlog size, or active backlog indicator when size is not exported.

targets.expr: topk(50, (ibc_ack_packet_backlog_size{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"} or on (chain_id, connection_id, port_id, channel_id, counterparty_chain_id, counterparty_port_id, counterparty_channel_id) (ibc_ack_packet_backlog_oldest_sequence{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}"} > bool 0)))

panels.title: Ack Backlog Inventory

panels.description: Current client counts grouped by chain and status.
panels.title: Client Status

panels.description: Oldest selected consensus state update age.
panels.title: Oldest Consensus Age

panels.description: Highest elapsed percentage of any selected client trusting period.

targets.expr: max((100 * (time() - ibc_client_last_update_timestamp_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}"}) / ibc_client_trusting_period_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}"}) and on (client_id, chain_id, counterparty_chain_id, counterparty_client_id) ibc_client_trusting_period_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}"} > 0) or vector(0)

panels.title: Max Trust Period Used

targets.expr: topk(100, (100 * (time() - ibc_client_last_update_timestamp_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}"}) / ibc_client_trusting_period_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}"}) and on (client_id, chain_id, counterparty_chain_id, counterparty_client_id) ibc_client_trusting_period_seconds{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}"} > 0)

sum by (chain_id, state) (ibc_channel_state{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}", state=~"${channel_state:regex}"})

ibc_channel_state{job=~"${job:regex}", chain_id=~"${chain_id:regex}", counterparty_chain_id=~"${counterparty_chain_id:regex}", connection_id=~"${connection_id:regex}", port_id=~"${port_id:regex}", channel_id=~"${channel_id:regex}", state=~"${channel_state:regex}"}

title: IBC Prometheus Exporter
